cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which of these options is a humorous edit of the artist/movie name "sleater-kinney". The options are A through D. Let me start by recalling what the original name is. Sleater-Kinney is a well-known indie rock band, right? The correct spelling is "Sleater-Kinney".
